example.value: "Berog sanget ajeh bacet bernor, tah kinyik ma?" Wak Pira kiurok nu iamek mase ubai ku hospitel, ubai sueg ha itenek de pai kiperikyos.

example.value: "Bile ngraknak doh, eng ngha-beh deg eng begei ajeh," Wak Nina kipasal nu iamek sambel kiternyol nu deg mai kaya.

translation.value: "Apabila saya dewasa nanti, saya mahu membuat rumah seperti itu," Wak Nina memberitahu kepada ibunya sambil menuding jarinya kepada rumah mewah yang dimiliki oleh orang kaya.
"When I grow up, I want to build a house like that house," Wak Nina told her mother while pointing to a big house which belonged to a rich person.

Bah Man reversed the shirt he was wearing, he had not realised that he was wearing it inside-out.

Wak Nina flipped the fish that she was frying so that the other side was also cooked.

definitionorgloss.value: sewang; sejenis tarian untuk upacara memuja semangat atau roh-roh. Ianya dijalankan untuk meminta penyembuhan atau dijalankan pada musim menuai bagi memuja semangat padi dll.
spirit dance; a type of ritual dance for worshipping the spirits

example.value: "Ku kampug jik mong bibeh progrem ya sanget-sanget UM, jadi mai kampug mong naibeh persembahan beasek ha mai luar ajeh, naiha-perneng budaye mai hik," Wak Salia kipasal nu ikekawat sekulah.

translation.value: "Di kampung kami terdapt program yang dianjurkan oleh pelajar-pelajar UM, jadi orang-orang di kampung kami ada membuat persembahan tarian sewang untuk mereka yang dari luar, supaya mereka mengetahui kebudayaan kita orang Semai," Wak Salia memberitahu rakan-rakan di sekolahnya.

"In our village there is an event organized by the UM students. The people in our village perform the spirit dance for the outsiders, so that they know our Semai culture," Wak Salia told her friends at school.

example.value: Bah Selan bibecare ku mahkamah ha isenalah kilanggar mutu ku nong entoi.

translation.value: Bah Selan menjalani perbicaraan di makhamah di atas kesalahannya melanggar motosikal di jalanraya.
Bah Selan is on trial in court for his offence of hitting a motorcycle on the road.

definitionorgloss.value: berbincang; mengadakan pertemuan untuk membincangkan tentang sesuatu perkara yang melibatkan adat resam dan hal-hal yang berkaitan dengan masyarakat
to discuss; to have a meeting to discuss a matter involving customs and a community-related matter

example.value: Apak Wak Murni kiet nu Kg. Telau besama ru wares puak kerdor medei naiha-becare ha hal perenjeg Wak Leng ru Bah Tang.

translation.value: Ayah Wak Murni pergi ke Kg. Telau bersama dengan wakil keluarga dari pihak perempuan kerana ingin membincangkan tentang hal perkahwinan Wak Leng dengan Bah Tang.
Wak Murni's father went to Kg. Telau with the family representatives from the bride's side because they wanted to discuss Wak Leng's marriage with Bah Tang.

example.value: Wak Ani kibecot kineng kek de ku lungkang englag kedei Mamak ajeh.

translation.value: Wak Ani merasa jijik melihat muntah yang terdapat di longkang pada sebelah kedai Mamak tersebut.
Wak Ani was disgusted to see the vomit in the drain next to the Mamak restaurant.

example-2.value: Lungkang ku kedei mamak ajeh ihad bencot medei tebeg ya minyak ru sesak caknak, telas ajeh bitop ya jeoi roi.

translation-2.value: Longkang di kedai mamak tersebut sangat menjijikkan kerana dipenuhi dengan minyak dan sisa makanan, selepas itu diurung oleh banyak lalat.
The drain in the mamak shop is very disgusting because it is filled with oil and food waste, then it is swarmed over by many flies.

example.value: Bah Sari biles ya iapak medei kibedeah ha iamek, kisemanj duet kiurok ha sekulah, tapi kiguna ha bende kilek.

translation.value: Bah Sari dimarahi oleh bapanya kerana menipu ibunya dengan meminta duit dengan berkata ianya adalah bagi tujuan persekolahan, tetapi beliau membelanjakannya pada perkara yang lain.

example.value: Bah Ian bipet ya iapak medei kisegat beh ikerjak sekulah.

translation.value: Bah Ian dipukul oleh bapanya kerana beliau malas membuat kerja sekolahnya.
Bah Ian was beaten by his father because he was too lazy to do his homework.

example.value: Adif kibeh ikerjak dari pukol 8:30 pegelap lei 5:30 dui.

translation.value: Adif melakukan kerjanya dari pukul 8:30 pagi sehingga 5:30 petang.
Adif does his work from 8:30 am to 5:30 pm.

example-2.value: Bah Surin kigemar bahbeh lawak nu ikekawat.

translation-2.value: Bah Surin suka membuat lawak pada kawan-kawannya.
Bah Surin likes to make jokes on his friends.

example-2.value: Sengoi de bahbeh deg pek kihol arik adeh kerana kinyaknyik.

translation-2.value: Orang yang membuat rumah tidak datang pada hari ini kerana dia sakit.
The person who made the house did not come today because he was sick.

example-2.value: "Agok risau, ajeh apeka betol-betol kijap, kibahbeh taleh medei kisengoh doh birok," Bah Jali kipasal nu Bah Man ha ikenon sanget de kigemar perenjap ha ilei, lagi-lagi amen kisengoh birok.

translation-2.value: "Jangan risau, dia bukan betul-betul menangis, itu dia berpura-pura sahaja kerana takut akan dimarahi," Bah Jali memberitahu kepada Bah Man mengenai anak kecilnya yang sudak berpura-pura menangis, terutama jika takut akan dimarahi.

"Do not worry, he is not crying for real, he is just pretending because he was afraid of being scolded," Bah Jali told Bah Man regarding his child who liked to pretend to cry especially when he was afriad of being scolded.

example-2.value: "Bok bahneh koi gelag adeh? Sedap!" Wak Lila kitanya.

translation-2.value: "Siapa pembuat kuih gelang ini? Sedap!" Wak Lila bertanya.
"Who made this doughnut? It is delicious!" Wak Lila asked.

example-2.value: "Bernor bahneh lukisan Wak Maria adeh, ilei mimang mong bakat belukes," Cikgu Jamilah kipateh ianak muret ajeh nu Cikgu Ramlah.

searchTexts: Bah Ian bipet ya iapak medei kisegat beh ikerjak sekulah.
Bah Ian dipukul oleh bapanya kerana beliau malas membuat kerja sekolahnya.
Bah Ian was beaten by his father because he was too lazy to do his homework.
Adif kibeh ikerjak dari pukol 8:30 pegelap lei 5:30 dui.
Adif melakukan kerjanya dari pukul 8:30 pagi sehingga 5:30 petang.
Adif does his work from 8:30 am to 5:30 pm.
Bah Surin kigemar bahbeh lawak nu ikekawat.
Bah Surin suka membuat lawak pada kawan-kawannya.
Bah Surin likes to make jokes on his friends.
Sengoi de bahbeh deg pek kihol arik adeh kerana kinyaknyik.
Orang yang membuat rumah tidak datang pada hari ini kerana dia sakit.
The person who made the house did not come today because he was sick.
"Agok risau, ajeh apeka betol-betol kijap, kibahbeh taleh medei kisengoh doh birok," Bah Jali kipasal nu Bah Man ha ikenon sanget de kigemar perenjap ha ilei, lagi-lagi amen kisengoh birok.

"Jangan risau, dia bukan betul-betul menangis, itu dia berpura-pura sahaja kerana takut akan dimarahi," Bah Jali memberitahu kepada Bah Man mengenai anak kecilnya yang sudak berpura-pura menangis, terutama jika takut akan dimarahi.

"Do not worry, he is not crying for real, he is just pretending because he was afraid of being scolded," Bah Jali told Bah Man regarding his child who liked to pretend to cry especially when he was afriad of being scolded.
"Bok bahneh koi gelag adeh? Sedap!" Wak Lila kitanya.
"Siapa pembuat kuih gelang ini? Sedap!" Wak Lila bertanya.
"Who made this doughnut? It is delicious!" Wak Lila asked.
"Bernor bahneh lukisan Wak Maria adeh, ilei mimang mong bakat belukes," Cikgu Jamilah kipateh ianak muret ajeh nu Cikgu Ramlah.
"Cantik hasil lukisan Wak Maria ini, dia memang mempunyai bakat melukis," Cikgu Jamilah memuji anak muridnya itu kepada Cikgu Ramlah.
"The end product of Wak Maria's drawing is beautiful, she indeed has a talent for drawing," Teacher Jamilah said, praising her pupil to Teacher Ramlah.

example.value: Bah Lali kiges iteg medei behej bikap ya kemet.

translation.value: Bah Lali menggaru tangannya kerana gatal digigit oleh nyamuk.
Bah Lali scratched his hand because it was itchy having been bitten by a mosquito.

example-2.value: "Agok main ku beg keneng gag ajeh, doh berahej berog engkek," Wak Ngah kiurok nu icecenok.

translation-2.value: "Jangan bermain dekat dengan pokok keladi itu, nanti badan kamu akan gatal-gatal," Wak Ngah berkata kepada cucu-cucunya.
"Do not play near the taro plant, your body will be itchy (because of the sap)," Wak Ngah said to her grandchildren.

example.value: "Amen hacip jog hajoi nu belakang deg Bah Rami, buleh habelas nu deg Bah Pani ru sekejap taleh halei. Tapi amen hajoi nong timbok, hod hapuseng nyak ru hod haguna mutu atao kerite," Bah Gani kipasal nu Bah Wan.

translation.value: "Jika kamu pergi dengan berjalan kaki ke belakang rumah Bah Rami, kamu boleh memintas ke rumah Bah Pani dengan sekejap sahaja. Tetapi, jika kamu mahu mengikuti jalan raya, kamu hendaklah berpusing jauh dan harus menggunakan motosikal atau kereta," Bah Gani memberitahu kepada Bah Wan.

"If you go on foot to the back of Bah Rami's house, you can take the shortcut to Bah Pani's house and get there very quickly. But, if you want to follow the road, you have to take a roundabout route  and you must use a motorcycle or car," Bah Gani told Bah Wan.

example.value: Bah Man kidat medei kiyog ku kemil besi de kicucok ienteh, balas nu ikenog.

translation.value: Bah Man meninggal dunia kerana terjatuh di atas besi yang mencucuk dadanya dan menembusi ke belakang badannya.
Bah Man died as he fell on a piece of iron that pierced his chest and penetrated the back of his body.

definitionorgloss.value: beranda; bahagian sisi atau depan rumah yang tidak berdindang dan menjadi pintu masuk utama ke dalam rumah

example.value: "Deg ku kampug eng mong iberanda ku ngar deg. Jap kelem mesti nggei ku pajeh medei serunuk bipoi ya pinoi sengij," Bah Pipi kipasal nu ikekawat.

translation.value: "Terdapat beranda di depan rumah pada rumah di kampung saya. Setiap malam saya pasti akan duduk di situ kerana merasa nyaman ditiup oleh angin yang sejuk," Bah Pipi memberitahu kepada rakan-rakannya.
"There is a verandah in front of my house in the village. Every night I will be sure to sit there to feel the fresh air blown by the cold wind," Bah Pipi told his friends.

example.value: Bah Wan kibercep iduet ku kateh inelipat baju medei kiperasan selalo nyep iduet ku kateh idabal, kisyak bikot ya imenang.

translation.value: Bah Wan menyoroki duitnya di antara lipatan bajunya kerana dia perasan bahawa duit di dalam dompetnya selalu hilang dan beliau mengsyaki adiknya yang mencuri duitnya tersebut.

Bah Wan hid his money between the folds of his shirt (in the closet) because he noticed that the money in his wallet was always missing and he suspected that it was his brother who was stealing the money.

definitionorgloss-2.value: bersembunyi; melindungi diri dari dilihat atau ditemui oleh orang lain
to hide oneself from other people

example-2.value: Kenon Wak Mila kiberencep ku englag pintu mase bicereg ya iapak medei baha-permuh.

translation-2.value: Anak Wak Mila bersembunyi di sebalik pintu semasa dipanggil oleh bapanya kerana mahu memandikannya.
Wak Mila's son was hiding behind the door,  while he was being called by his father because he wanted to bathe him.

ms: Bah Wan menyoroki duitnya di antara lipatan bajunya kerana dia perasan bahawa duit di dalam dompetnya selalu hilang dan beliau mengsyaki adiknya yang mencuri duitnya tersebut.
bersembunyi; melindungi diri dari dilihat atau ditemui oleh orang lain
Anak Wak Mila bersembunyi di sebalik pintu semasa dipanggil oleh bapanya kerana mahu memandikannya.
en: to hide something

Bah Wan hid his money between the folds of his shirt (in the closet) because he noticed that the money in his wallet was always missing and he suspected that it was his brother who was stealing the money.
to hide oneself from other people
Wak Mila's son was hiding behind the door,  while he was being called by his father because he wanted to bathe him.

example.value: Atak kibesat nu jik, "Amen engkeet nu lengrik mai, agok sip lei."

translation.value: Datuk memberi nasihat kepada kami, "Jika kamu ke tempat orang, jangan lupa diri."
Grandpa advised us, "if you go to someone else's place, do not forget who you are."

example.value: "Eng ngha-et nu kedei, mong ma-ma de habesatka?" Bah Asri kiurok nu ikenah.

translation.value: "Saya mahu pergi kedai, kamu ada apa-apa permintaankah?" Bah Asri berkata kepada isterinya.
"I want to go the shop, do you have any request?" Bah Asri said to his wife.

example-2.value: Hik hunen buleh hiog bengsat melalui hanpon.

translation-2.value: Kita sekarang boleh menghantar pesanan hanya melalui telefon bimbit.
Now we can send a message via a mobile phone.

example.value: Wak Alia kicip deras-dears ru kihod agij kijog madeg medei mong numom keral de pek kikenal kibeseh ha ilei ju ikenog.

translation.value: Wak Alia berjalan dengan pantas dan mahu cepat sampai ke rumahnya kerana terdapat seorang lelaki yang beliau tidak dikenali mengekorinya dari belakang.
Wak Alia walked very fast and was in a hurry to arrive home because an unknown man was following her from behind.

example.value: "Tah cerite ma de besengral ku TV? Leknog ubai lei nu deg wal adeh," Wak Ngah kiurok nu igensir ha kekenon kerdor ubai.

translation.value: "Cerita apa yang melucukan di TV? Suara mereka berdua ketawa kedengaran sehingga ke dapur," Wak Ngah berkata kepada suaminya tentang kedua-dua anak gadis mereka.
"I wonder what is the funny show that they are watching on the TV? The laughter of the two of them can be heard as far away as the kitchen," Wak Ngah said to her husband about their two daughters.

example.value: Wak Alia ru imenang ubai log besenglar ubai neng cerite lawak ku TV.

translation.value: Wak Alia dan adiknya ketawa dengan terbahak-bahak menontoh cerita lawak di TV.
Wak Alia and her sister laughed out loud watching the funny TV show.

example.value: Wak Ania kigemar bet ku deg awat medei ha leap.

translation.value: Wak Ania suka tidur di rumah buluh kerana ianya sejuk di situ.
Wak Ania likes to sleep at the bamboo house because it is cool there.

example-2.value: Jeoi mai bibet ku deg sempak medei naiha-jaga sempak.

translation-2.value: Ramai orang yang tidur di pondok durian kerana mahu menjaga durian mereka.
Many people sleep in the huts at the durian orchard because they want to watch over their durians.

example-2.value: Ijam ya pukol 12 padek arik kelem, tapi mat Bah Aram kinyek bukbet medei ha jeoi de kipiker.

translation-2.value: Jam sudah pukul 12 tengah malam, tetapi mata Bah Aram masih tidak mahu tidur kerana banyak perkara yang dia fikirkan.
It was already 12 midnight, but Bah Aram still did not want to sleep because of the many things that he was thinking.

definitionorgloss-2.value: menutup (tidur atau sekadar untuk melelapkan mata)

example-2.value: Bah Midan kiperbet imat, pure-pure kibukbet mase bicereg ya iamek medei bior et cah kebon ceber.

translation-2.value: Bah Midan memejamkan matanya, berpura-pura sedang tidur semasa dipanggil oleh ibunya yang menyuruh dia pergi menebas semak dan lalang di kebun getah.
Bah Midan closed his eyes, pretending to be asleep when he was being called by his mother who told him to go and cut down the bushes and weeds at the rubber plantation.

searchTexts: Wak Ania kigemar bet ku deg awat medei ha leap.
Wak Ania suka tidur di rumah buluh kerana ianya sejuk di situ.
Wak Ania likes to sleep at the bamboo house because it is cool there.
Jeoi mai bibet ku deg sempak medei naiha-jaga sempak.
Ramai orang yang tidur di pondok durian kerana mahu menjaga durian mereka.
Many people sleep in the huts at the durian orchard because they want to watch over their durians.
Ijam ya pukol 12 padek arik kelem, tapi mat Bah Aram kinyek bukbet medei ha jeoi de kipiker.
Jam sudah pukul 12 tengah malam, tetapi mata Bah Aram masih tidak mahu tidur kerana banyak perkara yang dia fikirkan.
It was already 12 midnight, but Bah Aram still did not want to sleep because of the many things that he was thinking.
menutup (tidur atau sekadar untuk melelapkan mata)
Bah Midan kiperbet imat, pure-pure kibukbet mase bicereg ya iamek medei bior et cah kebon ceber.

example.value: "Bah Rilan adeh ikepale, kibetek mabek sanget nu mateu! Naicip ratak liknai sanget, amen engkecelog harok?" amek kiles ha memenang jik.

translation.value: "Bah Rilan ini ketuanya, membawa kanak-kanak ke sungai! Yang pergi ke sungai semuanya kanak-kanak sahaja, jika kalian lemas bagaimana?" ibu memarahi adik-adik kami.
"Bah Rilan is the leader, leading the children to the river! Those who go to the river are only children, what if you all drown?" Mom scolded our younger siblings.

example.value: "Mat eng pek dapat ngburu bik amen ya kelem," Bah Aril kipasal nu Bah Wan.

translation.value: "Mata saya tidak dapat melihat dengan jelas pada waktu malam," Bah Aril memberitahu kepada Bah Wan.
"I can't see clearly at night," Bah Aril told Bah Wan.

example-2.value: "Gerteg abik engrok mai ajeh," Bah Rilan kiurok nu ikekawat kerjak de naibelwal mase tengah naibemesyuarat.

translation-2.value: "Dengar dengan jelas perkara yang di katakan oleh orang tersebut," Bah Rilan berkata kepada rakan-rakan sekerjanya yang bersembang sesama sendiri semasa mereka sedang bermesyuarat.
"Listen clearly to what the person is saying," Bah Rilan told his colleagues who were chatting with each other while they were in the meeting.

searchTexts: "Mat eng pek dapat ngburu bik amen ya kelem," Bah Aril kipasal nu Bah Wan.

"Gerteg abik engrok mai ajeh," Bah Rilan kiurok nu ikekawat kerjak de naibelwal mase tengah naibemesyuarat.
"Dengar dengan jelas perkara yang di katakan oleh orang tersebut," Bah Rilan berkata kepada rakan-rakan sekerjanya yang bersembang sesama sendiri semasa mereka sedang bermesyuarat.

example.value: "Bok taleh de naihod beneh ceber ju RISDA, buleh naiog muh nu seten kampug," Bah Murad kipasal mase mesyuarat kampug.

example.value: "Yama jenpej baju eng ajeh? Baju ajeh lekat bor ru lekat buleh ngpakei," Wak Mila kiurok nu iamek.

translation.value: "Kenapa ibu buang baju itu? Baju itu masih baik dan saya masih boleh memakainya," Wak Mila berkata kepada ibunya.
"Why did you throw away the shirt? The shirt is still good and I can still wear it," Wak Mila said to her mother.

example.value: Bah Ali kijog awal ju ikerjak ku arik ajeh medei kirasa iberog pek memerip bor.

translation.value: Bah Ali pulang awal dari tempat kerjanya pada hari tersebut kerana merasa badannya tidak berberapa sihat.
Bah Ali returned home early from work that day because he did not feel well.

example.value: Amen mong kesempatan, Bah Yadi kigemar engen iperingak becuti nu Cameron Highland medei pemandangan de bor ru cuace de sengij kibeh kek rasa tenang.

translation.value: Jika terdapat kesempatan, Bah Yadi suka membawa keluarganya bercuti ke Cameron Highland kerana pemandangan yang cantik dan cuaca yang sejuk membuatkan beliau merasa tenang.
If there is an opportunity, Bah Yadi likes to take his family on holiday to the Cameron Highlands because the beautiful scenery and cool weather make him feel calm.

definitionorgloss-2.value: ucapan selamat; ucapan yang mengandungi harapan supaya tidak kurang apa-apa atau dalam keadaan sejahtera; aman
expression for greetings meaning "be well" or "be safe"

example-2.value: "Abor," kenah Bah Saha kiurok nu ilei mase kaha-et nu ikerjak.

translation-2.value: "Semoga selamat," isteri Bah Saha berkata kepadanya semasa dia hendak ke tempat kerja.
"Be (extra) safe," Bah Saha's wife told him when he wanted to go to work.

example-2.value: "Hek doh cip abor, inong nu majeh niknej," Bah Duan kiurok nu ikenon de kaha-jog nu kampug enai.

translation-2.value: "Nanti jalan dengan berhati-hati, laluan untuk ke sana sangat teruk," Bah Duan berkata kepada anaknya yang mahu pulang ke kampung mereka.
"Drive carefully, the route to get there is very bad," Bah Duan said to his son who wanted to return to their village.

definitionorgloss-2.value: sangat cantik; amat cantik dan lawa

example-2.value: "Bernor bunga ros ilei bicet ku beng deg ajeh," Wak Manja kipasal nu iamek.

translation-2.value: "Bunga ros yang ditanam di tepi rumah tersebut sangat cantik," Wak Manja memberitahu kepada ibunya.
"The roses planted at the side of the house are very beautiful," Wak Manja said to her mother.

example-2.value: Nong nu bernor, hajap mai naiha-joi. Tapi, amen nong nu jenghat, jeoi mai naiha-joi.

translation-2.value: Jalan ke arah kebaikan, orang susah nak ikut. Tapi, kalau jalan ke arah kejahatan ramai orang nak ikut.
The road to goodness is difficult for people to follow. But, the road to evil many people want to follow.

example-2.value: Bah Sang kiajak ikenon litau ubai terbor pelog deg enai de teloh bitimpak ya pelek jeer mase manik anoh neh.

translation-2.value: Bah Sang mengajak anak bujangnya memperbaiki atap rumah mereka yang bocor ditimpa buah kelapa semasa hujan sebentar tadi.
Bah Sang asked his unmarried son to help him repair the roof of their house because it was leaking, having been hit by coconuts during the rain that had just stopped.

searchTexts: "Yama jenpej baju eng ajeh? Baju ajeh lekat bor ru lekat buleh ngpakei," Wak Mila kiurok nu iamek.
"Kenapa ibu buang baju itu? Baju itu masih baik dan saya masih boleh memakainya," Wak Mila berkata kepada ibunya.
"Why did you throw away the shirt? The shirt is still good and I can still wear it," Wak Mila said to her mother.
Bah Ali kijog awal ju ikerjak ku arik ajeh medei kirasa iberog pek memerip bor.
Bah Ali pulang awal dari tempat kerjanya pada hari tersebut kerana merasa badannya tidak berberapa sihat.
Bah Ali returned home early from work that day because he did not feel well.
Amen mong kesempatan, Bah Yadi kigemar engen iperingak becuti nu Cameron Highland medei pemandangan de bor ru cuace de sengij kibeh kek rasa tenang.
Jika terdapat kesempatan, Bah Yadi suka membawa keluarganya bercuti ke Cameron Highland kerana pemandangan yang cantik dan cuaca yang sejuk membuatkan beliau merasa tenang.
If there is an opportunity, Bah Yadi likes to take his family on holiday to the Cameron Highlands because the beautiful scenery and cool weather make him feel calm.
ucapan selamat; ucapan yang mengandungi harapan supaya tidak kurang apa-apa atau dalam keadaan sejahtera; aman
expression for greetings meaning "be well" or "be safe"
"Abor," kenah Bah Saha kiurok nu ilei mase kaha-et nu ikerjak.
"Semoga selamat," isteri Bah Saha berkata kepadanya semasa dia hendak ke tempat kerja.
"Be (extra) safe," Bah Saha's wife told him when he wanted to go to work.
"Hek doh cip abor, inong nu majeh niknej," Bah Duan kiurok nu ikenon de kaha-jog nu kampug enai.
"Nanti jalan dengan berhati-hati, laluan untuk ke sana sangat teruk," Bah Duan berkata kepada anaknya yang mahu pulang ke kampung mereka.
"Drive carefully, the route to get there is very bad," Bah Duan said to his son who wanted to return to their village.
sangat cantik; amat cantik dan lawa
"Bernor bunga ros ilei bicet ku beng deg ajeh," Wak Manja kipasal nu iamek.
"Bunga ros yang ditanam di tepi rumah tersebut sangat cantik," Wak Manja memberitahu kepada ibunya.
"The roses planted at the side of the house are very beautiful," Wak Manja said to her mother.
Nong nu bernor, hajap mai naiha-joi. Tapi, amen nong nu jenghat, jeoi mai naiha-joi.
Jalan ke arah kebaikan, orang susah nak ikut. Tapi, kalau jalan ke arah kejahatan ramai orang nak ikut.
The road to goodness is difficult for people to follow. But, the road to evil many people want to follow.
Bah Sang kiajak ikenon litau ubai terbor pelog deg enai de teloh bitimpak ya pelek jeer mase manik anoh neh.
Bah Sang mengajak anak bujangnya memperbaiki atap rumah mereka yang bocor ditimpa buah kelapa semasa hujan sebentar tadi.
Bah Sang asked his unmarried son to help him repair the roof of their house because it was leaking, having been hit by coconuts during the rain that had just stopped.

definitionorgloss.value: to say; to utter; to converse

example.value: "Pek ngpaham ma de habual ajeh," Bah Atan kiurok nu Bah Man.

translation.value: "Saya tidak faham apa yang kamu katakan," Bah Atan berkata kepada Bah Man.
"I do not understand what you said," Bah Atan said to Bah Man.

example-2.value: Ku mai hik, bikira ajeh biadap amen mambek sanget naicampong amen mai raknak tengah naibelwal.

translation-2.value: Pada orang Semai, adalah biadap sekiranya orang yang lebih muda turut serta apabila orang tua sedang bercakap.
For the Semai, it is rude if younger people join in the conversation of elders.

example-2.value: "Eng ngcerengai bengwal mai ju kampug englag, huper mong canak nikah Bah Uda ku pajeh," Wak Saini kipasal nu iamek.

translation-2.value: S"aya dengar perbualan dari penduduk kampung sebelah, esok ada kenduri perkahwinan Bah Uda di sana," Wak Saini membertahu ibunya.
"I heard a conversation of the people from the next village; tomorrow Bah Uda will have his wedding feast there," Wak Saini told her mother.

"I do not understand what you said," Bah Atan said to Bah Man.
Ku mai hik, bikira ajeh biadap amen mambek sanget naicampong amen mai raknak tengah naibelwal.
Pada orang Semai, adalah biadap sekiranya orang yang lebih muda turut serta apabila orang tua sedang bercakap.
For the Semai, it is rude if younger people join in the conversation of elders.

Wak Hani always takes her children to the playground because they like to play on the swings there.
to swing on a swing
"Do not swing on the swing too fast, you will fall," Wak Hani said to her children.
